characters.name: Coach Carp
characters.description: Coach Carp and Ginger Coach Carpis a semi-antagonist, who appears once in Two Guys, a Car, and a Wild Bear. He first appeared when Ginger came to his office, and informs him that he gave her a "B" instead of an "A" in his class, but he confirms that it was no mistake, as he explains that while Ginger's pushups were clean, on her 17th push up, her noses didn't touch the ground, and that why she got an "B". This led to a Prank War against him and Ginger.

characters.name: Dani
characters.description: Dani appeared in the episode "Double crush" as a motor bike girl. First time the guy's saw her they didn't know that it's a girl and as soon as Dani took off the helmet they both seemed to be surprised. In that time both Zeke and Luther admitted that they like Dani. Thought all the episode they were trying to impress her and compete for the place to be her boyfriend. And Luther guessed her name right when he guessed "Danisaurus." Portrayed by Danielle Campbell

characters.name: Dorothy Waffles
characters.description: "Nana" lives in an apartment with her husband Carl. She often inspires Luther because he does not want to disappoint her loft view of him, and the boys often come to her aid when she's in trouble.

characters.name: Eddie Coletti
characters.description: Eddie Colettiis the owner of Riot Skates, the company thatZeke,Luther, andSusie Vandelintzerare sponsored by. His nickname is "Sweaty Eddie", because of his major sweating problem.

characters.name: Garm Garoosh
characters.description: He was once famous skater but due to Luther's flash photography, he suffered an injury and retired. In "Luther Waffles and the Skateboard of Doom", he attempts to get revenge on Luther by strapping Luther on a explosive magnetic skateboard but fails and gets arrested. In the same episode he has an assistant Theo.

characters.name: Garrett Delfino
characters.description: Stinky Cast is known for his cast, and has ants living inside his cast, soGingergave him bug repellent, because she thought it was gross that ants lived in his cast. ("Summer School"). Stinky Cast also gaveGingera Slingshot, just so she could shoot herZekeandLutherout of the air, while they were attempting a stunt involving helium, and their pants. Also, Stinky Cast ruinedGinger'sdate withHart Hamlin, by kissingGingerthis gaveGingernightmares.

characters.name: Ginger Falcone
characters.description: 11-12 (Season 2) 12-13 (Season 3) Ginger is Zeke's little sister, and she is smart, but constantly looks for ways to torture her brother, like telling Olivia he likes her and ratting Zeke and Luther out when they hid in "Bros Go Pro". She also has a habit for making stands such as a falafel stand in the pilot episode and a lemonade stand in the episode "Bros Go Pro". She stresses personal hygiene and having a clean and sanitary surrounding as seen in the episode "Robo-Luth" She's also an accomplished flutist and can also tumble as shown in episode "Skate Camp". She is REALLY good at pulling pranks, and just torturing her brother in general. Zeke and her generally don't get along, but in the episode "Not my Sister's Keeper", They say each other's birthdays, and smile, showing that deep down they really do love each other even if they don't show it. She is the main antagonist of series.

characters.name: Hart Hamlin
characters.description: Hart Hamlinis a popular handsomeguy who likes only girls who are taller than him.Gingerhad a crush on him and planed her own "surprise" birthday party to try to get him. It failed. Ginger had a second chance with Hart, but their date was ruined byStinkywhen he kissed her while she was about to kiss Hart.

characters.name: Hayley Kiyoko
characters.description: Hayley Kiyoko Hayley Kiyoko Alcroft[[|[1]]](born April 3, 1991), known professionally as Hayley Kiyoko, is an American actress, singer, songwriter, musician, and dancer. She is best known for playingVelma DinkleyinScooby-Doo! The Mystery BeginsandScooby-Doo! Curse of the Lake Monster, as well as Stella Yamada in theDisney ChannelfilmLemonade Mouth.

characters.name: Hootie Kepphart
characters.description: Hootie Kepphart is a grade a nosle jockey who struts around in doing his dorkish dweebus impersonation of a militant. He thinks skateboarding is a waste of time.

characters.name: Kirby Cheddar
characters.description: Kirby Cheddar is a fat, loving, and a rich kid that lives near Zeke and Luther. Many of the character consider him wimpy and annoying, though he is good-hearted. He plays the trombone and the air drums. His mother is very overprotective. He was also hurt by a shark twice, the first time was at sea, the second time was rather sad because he was pushed by Kojo into the shark tank while Kojo gave him nachos and Kirby said "oh boy, Kirby Cheddar, things are finaly starting to look up, while he got knocked into the tank.

characters.name: Korneilius Jonesworth
characters.description: Monica LopezBonita Luther Waffles Korneilius Johnsworth also know as Kojo in the Disney XD hit series Zeke and Luther is one of the main antagonists in the series he is sort of like a half friend half enemy towards Zeke and Luther but it always fighting for his spot at being the best skater in town one thing you should know about Kojo is he is a ladies man dating both “Monica Lopez” and “Mia Falcone” Zeke’s cousin who appears one time out of the whole series in the Season 2 episode “Sludge” as well as dating almost every as he likes to call “female lady” in Gilroy he was also in Luther’s airband and played the bass. Cocky, and a ladies man

characters.name: Lisa Grubner
characters.description: 13 (Season 2)14 (Season 3) Lisa is a young, geeky girl who has an overwhelming crush onZeke.  She lives in a large pink dollhouse in her parents' driveway.  Her first appearance was in the episode "Donut Jockey."  She was twelve years old at the time. She is crazed by her crush on Zeke and as Zeke states in "Sibling Rivalries," she is not even legally allowed to call his house anymore.  A known fact is that she plays flute and does gymnastics.  She has an older brother named Kenny.
